name: Owens
description: A stunning oceanfront retreat with 12 luxurious bedrooms — each with a private bathroom — in the exclusive, gated Pine Island community in Corolla on the Outer Banks. Nestled beside the tranquil Audubon Sanctuary, it's a purpose-built special-event home for weddings and large gatherings, with an elevator, hot tub, theater room, game room and fitness space across multiple levels.

price.note: All-in for Oct 4–11, 2026 (Sun–Sun week covering the Oct 10 target): $12,729 rent + $175 admin + $1,629 tax = $14,534. Peak late-Aug is far higher — Aug 23–30 (covers Aug 29): $19,796 rent, $22,492 all-in. Strongly seasonal; pulled 2026-06-06 from the site's booking-engine quote.

availability.notes: Checked 2026-06-06 via the site's availability calendar. Of the target Saturdays, Aug 29, Oct 3 and Oct 10 are open (October 2026 is wide open); Aug 22 is booked. Rentals run Sunday-to-Sunday (Sunday turn day), so a Saturday wedding means booking the Sun–Sun week around it (e.g. Oct 4–11 for Oct 10, Aug 23–30 for Aug 29).

contact.name: Atlantic Realty of the Outer Banks

notes: Dedicated wedding/event home — event capacity 60. Preferred planning partner is 11th Hour Weddings & Events (could add as a linked supplier). Pricing is weekly and seasonal; need to request a quote. No on-site price listed.

attributes.amenities: Elevator, hot tub, theater room, game room, fitness room
